missing_fields: Outcomes in postmenopausal women on menopausal hormone therapy

sources.source_title: Reviewed source set — search record for icosapent ethyl outcomes in postmenopausal women on menopausal hormone therapy
sources.study_design: Search of the explicitly reviewed source set
sources.population: Reviewed trials and labels for icosapent ethyl
sources.relevant_passage: The reviewed source set (including the REDUCE-IT trial, NCT01492361, in which women were 28.8% of participants) contained no source that reported cardiovascular outcomes specifically for postmenopausal women using menopausal hormone therapy. No relevant women-and-hormone-specific evidence was located in the reviewed sources.
sources.source_location: Search record over the reviewed source set
sources.classification_rationale: A search was executed and returned no source reporting outcomes for the selected women-and-hormone context. This is an evidence gap, not a finding about whether the medicine works.
